description: Product description These Self Adhesive Heat Pads - Feminine, are ideal for period pains, stomach cramps and back pains. They can also provide temporary refiel from minor aches and pains in muscles and joint, arthritis, strains, bruises and sprains. Each one is individually wrapped and easy to use. Simply to clotheing/underwear (do not apply directly to the skin) after a few minutes the heat will radiate through the source of pain - increasing circulation, decreasing stiffness and relaxing the desired area. Fragrence free, non-medicinal and with a thin discreet design. Use Masterplast Instant Heat Pads - Feminine to help banish those unwanted period aches and pains wherever you are. Indications Stomach cramps (menstrual cramps) and general pain relief Directions Simply attach the pad to clothing or underwear, ensuring it does not touch the skin directly. The heat will begin to radiate after a few minutes, targeting the source of pain and increasing circulation, decreasing stiffness, and relaxing the desired area. Safety Warning Do not use while sleeping. Do not apply directly to the skin. Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Do not use if damaged. Store in a cool, dry place. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Always follow the directions for use. In case of accidental contact with skin or eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. If swallowed, seek medical attention immediately and show the container or label. See more
